name: Nentoke Records
blurb: Nentoke Records — an independent label working at street level. Screenprinted sleeves, honest masters, no genre allegiance.
about: Nentoke Records is an independent label working at street level — records that start on walls, in basements, and on cassette dubs passed hand to hand. There is no house sound and no genre allegiance here: if it hits, we press it.
Every release gets a screenprinted sleeve and an honest master. The catalogue runs from NEN001 upward — play it loud, and pass it on.
Bookings, demos and distribution: get in touch below.
